concept: Inspire / To Breathe Generative Life Into Being
description: The act of filling someone with the urge or ability to do or feel something, especially to do something creative. It is the transmission of generative, life-affirming energy.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'phe' (generative action/breath), 'sua' (the state of being), and 'a' (openness). The word's structure means 'to bring a generative breath to the open state of being.' This captures the almost magical quality of inspiration as a transmission of creative life force.
